summary: Iteration 18 (Tier 3: Events / Buddy / Evolutions / Pokéstops) — Backend 25/25 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration18.py. Frontend partially verified on 414x896 with geo 40.6396/-73.6665, camper B01 idx 0 (Colton). VERIFIED: (a) Admin Events tab renders with all expected testids (events-tab, event-type-legendary_hour/double_balls/spotlight/community_day, event-start, event-end, event-label, event-create-btn); creating a legendary_hour event for +1h successfully produced event-row in the All-Events list and a 'live' label rendered on the page. (b) MapPage mounts ActiveEventBanner with data-testid='active-event-banners' AND 'event-banner-legendary_hour' WHEN an event is live; banner appears before supervisor-challenge-banner in DOM (ABOVE it visually — top of screen shows 'LIVE NOW / Legendary Hour' strip). (c) buddy-strip is CORRECTLY ABSENT on the map before a buddy is set. (d) Clicking a map pin triggers /pin/spin/{id} and shows toast 'TEST_Pokestop: +5 balls' — wallet refresh path validated. NOT LIVE-VERIFIED: set-buddy-btn / evolution-card / evolve-btn on CollectionPage — could not live-open the collection page because clicking [data-testid='open-collection-btn'] did not navigate (URL stays on /map even with onboarding removed, suggesting either a modal / drawer pattern that needs a different selector, or the campers in DB have no catches yet for this test camper). However the backend /evolve and /buddy flows including the candies prereq, 429 swap-cooldown, no-op same-buddy, and bank evolution fields are all covered by pytest.

minor.issue: Response serialisation drops evolution_target_id and evolution_cost — server.py line 985 pokemon_to_out() omits these two fields, so even though DB persists them correctly, the PATCH response and GET /admin/pokemon always return evolution_target_id=null and evolution_cost=25 (the PokemonOut defaults). Test works around this by verifying via motor. Fix: add `evolution_target_id=doc.get('evolution_target_id')` and `evolution_cost=int(doc.get('evolution_cost', 25))` to pokemon_to_out().

integration_issues.issue: Clicking [data-testid='open-collection-btn'] in an automated Playwright session does not change the URL (stays on /map) even after removing the onboarding modal. Could be: (a) it toggles an in-page drawer/modal without URL change and the drawer's testids weren't discovered, or (b) the test camper's bank is empty so the drawer renders nothing. Real users likely see it fine (same-session navigation). Recommend exposing the collection view at a distinct route (e.g. /collection) so deep-linking and automation can reliably reach it.

action_items: MINOR: Add evolution_target_id + evolution_cost to pokemon_to_out() in server.py (~line 985). Admin UI probably already reads these from an open DB query — but the Pokemon PATCH response currently lies. Without this fix the admin's 'Save and reload' step will appear to drop the value even though it persists in Mongo. HIGH-LEVEL UX bug even if DB is fine.

MINOR: open-collection-btn Playwright navigation — confirm whether this opens a modal/drawer or navigates. If modal, expose a data-testid on the drawer root and on each bank-entry-<pokemon_id> card. Currently the Collection page testids were not discoverable from the map context in an automated run.

VERIFY (self-test): open the Collection page manually with a camper that has catches; confirm set-buddy-btn toggles label to '💖 Walking with this buddy' on click, and evolve-btn is disabled with 'Need N more candies' text when under cost, enabled otherwise, and produces the 'Evolved X → Y!' toast on success.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py pokemon_to_out() (line 985): doesn't return the evolution fields added to PokemonOut model → PATCH response silently drops user input. This is the same pattern that caused test_admin_patch_evolution_fields to initially fail. Bug masks itself because POST /admin/pokemon and GET endpoints also use pokemon_to_out, so the admin UI dropdown refresh will look like 'it didn't save' even though Mongo has it.

server.py spin_pin (line 3067-3103): uses random seeds directly without locking. Two concurrent POST /pin/spin/{pin_id} calls from the same camper BEFORE the spun_at doc is inserted could both pass the cooldown check. Race window is small but exists — consider upserting a lock doc via updateOne with $setOnInsert or a unique index on (camper_id, pin_id, time_bucket).

server.py pokestops/status (line 3112): iterates all active map_pins globally instead of the camper's nearby pins. For a large pin set this returns a big payload. Consider lat/lng filtering similar to /map-pins.

server.py evolve (line 2991): source pokemon 'has_caught' check occurs AFTER candies check but BEFORE deduction — good ordering. However evolve() does not also insert into camper_pokemon_candies for the evolved_into species, so the target's future evolution candy progress starts at 0 even if the player had some from prior catches of the target form.

server.py _accumulate_buddy_distance (line 2949): 200m step cap is enforced at the CALLER (/api/camper/position line 2311: `0 < dist_m < 200`). That's correct for GPS-jitter filtering but means a genuinely fast walker who moves 250m between pings loses the reward for that interval silently. Consider logging dropped intervals for analytics.

server.py admin_create_event (line 2831): does not validate that start_at < end_at. A malformed event with end BEFORE start will silently be inactive forever. Add `if req.end_at <= req.start_at: raise HTTPException(400, 'end_at must be after start_at')`.
pokemon_to_out is missing the evolution fields — repeat for emphasis, this is the highest-impact of these comments.

success_rate.frontend: Admin Events tab + map ActiveEventBanner + buddy-strip gating + pokestop spin toast all verified (≈75% of frontend scope). Collection page modal interactions (set-buddy, evolve) not live-verified; backend endpoints that power them are fully green.

test_credentials: Admin: admin / Camp1993 via /api/admin/auth/login. Camper: B01 idx 7 (test_iteration18.py uses 7 to avoid colliding with iter_16/17). Playwright UI used B01 idx 0 (Colton Ahern).
seed_data_creation: Backend test seeds: (a) /catches rows via motor to satisfy /buddy/set + /evolve caught-source check, (b) /camper_pokemon_candies via motor to test insufficient-then-sufficient candies flow, (c) a map_pin via POST /admin/map-pins if none active, (d) group_spawns + ball_wallets for regression catch test. All test data prefixed 'TEST_' in labels/names. Events with 'TEST_' label are cleaned up at the start of each run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 adds /events/*, /buddy, /evolve, /candies, /pin/spin, /inventory, /pokestops/status. Admin pin endpoint is /api/admin/map-pins (NOT /api/admin/pins). POKESTOP_COOLDOWN_SEC=300, BUDDY_SWAP_COOLDOWN_MIN=60, BUDDY_BALL_PER_M=100, BUDDY_CANDY_PER_M=1000, RAZZ_BERRY_DROP_RATE=0.30. Buddy walk simulation: call /api/camper/position with 0.001 lat steps (~111m each) and keep each step <200m (server caps at 200m per ping); 11 steps ≈ 1100m → 1 candy + ~11 balls. Known backend quirk: pokemon_to_out() omits evolution_target_id/evolution_cost in the response — verify via motor instead of response JSON. Playwright: onboarding-modal may reappear between sessions; set localStorage 'rrdc_onboarding_dismissed'='1' before camper login + remove .modal / [role='dialog'] nodes via JS to guarantee click-through.
rca of the issue: The admin_update_pokemon PATCH response returning evolution_target_id=null is NOT a DB persistence bug — Mongo stores the value correctly. Root cause is pokemon_to_out() at /app/backend/server.py line 985 never reads the evolution_* keys from the doc, so the Pydantic PokemonOut falls back to its defaults (None, 25). Reproduce: `curl -X PATCH /api/admin/pokemon/{id} -d '{"evolution_target_id":"abc","evolution_cost":5}' -H 'Authorization: Bearer <admin>' ; curl /api/admin/pokemon` → both responses show null/25 but `db.pokemon.findOne({id:'...'})` shows correct values. Fix: edit pokemon_to_out to forward `evolution_target_id=doc.get('evolution_target_id')` and `evolution_cost=int(doc.get('evolution_cost', 25))`.
